name: vmp
description: Video Monetization Platform - HLS video streaming with subscription-based access control

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/video-processor && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/web
scripts.typecheck:deploy: npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vmp/video-processor && npm run typecheck:scripts --workspace=@vmp/web && npm run build:sw-push --workspace=@vmp/web
scripts.db:create: cd packages/api && wrangler d1 execute video-subscription-db --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/api && wrangler d1 execute video-subscription-db --file=./migrations/0002_seed.sql
